description: Kaggle is an online platform for data science and machine learning where users work with datasets, notebooks, models, benchmarks, and competitions. It also provides programmatic access to those resources through its public API tooling and MCP server.
summary: Kaggle exposes an OAuth 2.0 provider API, a remote MCP server at https://www.kaggle.com/mcp, and an official Kaggle CLI authenticated by OAuth or Kaggle-issued tokens/API credentials.
